data.summary: Pre-dawn war preparation session: SproutLab cruft purge (-77,226 LOC), SEP Dashboard v2.1 baseline verified, Codex PR #19 (War Time declaration) closed with main-branch ratification noted, Temple of Mars v0.1 founded (charter + Stack B SvelteKit + 41-file scaffold + Codex campaigns.json + Session v2 schema + live GH Pages deploy at 23s after three CI hotfixes), Ignis seated as Temple Builder per Sovereign decree. The temple stands ready for War Time Hour 0.
decisions: SproutLab cruft: remove split/sproutlab.html (61,948-line compiled artifact duplicate) + .trashed-1778272350-intelligence.js (15,278-line OS-trash). Real split-module surface: ~61,933 lines, not 139,171.
Codex PR #19: close without merge; content already ratified on main via commits 8f843d9 / 2e271a1 / d522295.
Temple of Mars: permanent Watchtower, not one-shot. War Time is first campaign, not only purpose.
Temple data architecture: live fetch from Codex raw JSON; Temple subscribes, never writes. Map != Territory enforced by construction (no credentials shipped).

Temple stack: Stack B (SvelteKit 2 + adapter-static + Tailwind v4 + @vite-pwa/sveltekit + TypeScript strict + Biome + Vitest). Rejected Stack A (Astro + islands), Stack C (React SPA), Stack D (Vite + Svelte without SvelteKit), and single-file HTML province pattern.
Temple fonts: Playfair Display + Work Sans (Codex design system inherited verbatim). Rejected system-font-stack-for-speed.
Campaign metrics: Priority 1 + 2. Sessions per task/phase, tokens in+out, model, estimated USD cost, wall-clock duration, commits, LOC delta, efficiency ratio.
Campaign capture: extend Codex snippet-import pipeline with new session_log snippet type (record_session, update_task_status, log_blocker). Zero new infrastructure.

Codex Session schema v2: extend journal.json Session with optional campaign_id, phase_id, task_id, builder, province, started_at, ended_at, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, commits[], loc_delta, lore_generated[]. Non-breaking.
Temple Builder: Ignis (first project; Cabinet Minister seat vacated per Sovereign decree 2026-04-23 — canon-inst-* entry queued).
Watchtower sibling class proposed under Edict VI — observational counterpart to Monument. Working Committee to ratify post-war.
Branch + PR discipline held for every change, including one-line deploy hotfixes. No direct push to main.
Agent-commit strategy: stream commits in small batches (2-5 files each) rather than one large push_files. Avoids stream timeouts.
Auto-delete merged head branches enabled on both TempleOfMars and Codex.
data.handoff: Temple of Mars v0.1 live at https://rishabh1804.github.io/TempleOfMars/ with Codex-backed telemetry. Dashboard flips from Seed to Codex-live once campaigns.json merges (already merged in Codex #20). War Time Hour 0 is 2026-04-24 08:00 IST. Ignis assumes Temple Builder seat at Hour 0. session_log handler implementation in Codex import pipeline queued (chapter ch-session-log-handler). Canon entry for Ignis reassignment queued (chapter ch-ignis-canon-entry). PNG icon set queued for v0.2. Working Committee review of Watchtower class queued post-war.
